We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 3.88s, d = 118.99m:
t^2 = 3.88 * 3.88:
3.88 * 0.08 = 0.3104
3.88 * 0.80 = 3.1040
3.88 * 3.00 = 11.6400
0.3104 + 3.1040 = 3.4144
3.4144 + 11.6400 = 15.0544
k = 118.99 / 3.88^2 = 118.99 / 15.0544 = 118.990 / 15.054
= 0 + 1 * 118990 / 15054
= 1 + 1 * 103936 / 15054
= 2 + 1 * 88882 / 15054
= 3 + 1 * 73828 / 15054
= 4 + 1 * 58774 / 15054
= 5 + 1 * 43720 / 15054
= 6 + 1 * 28666 / 15054
= 7 + 1 * 13612 / 15054
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 136120 / 15054
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 121066 / 15054
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 106012 / 15054
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 90958 / 15054
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 75904 / 15054
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 60850 / 15054
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 45796 / 15054
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 30742 / 15054
= 7.8 + 0.1 * 15688 / 15054
= 7.9 + 0.1 * 634 / 15054
= 7.90 + 0.01 * 6340 / 15054
= 7.900 + 0.001 * 63400 / 15054
= 7.901 + 0.001 * 48346 / 15054
= 7.902 + 0.001 * 33292 / 15054
= 7.903 + 0.001 * 18238 / 15054
= 7.904 + 0.001 * 3184 / 15054
= 7.904

t = 1.6s, d = 20.23m:
t^2 = 1.6 * 1.6:
1.6 * 0.6 = 0.96
1.6 * 1.0 = 1.60
0.96 + 1.60 = 2.56
k = 20.23 / 1.6^2 = 20.23 / 2.56 = 20.23 / 2.56
= 0 + 1 * 2023 / 256
= 1 + 1 * 1767 / 256
= 2 + 1 * 1511 / 256
= 3 + 1 * 1255 / 256
= 4 + 1 * 999 / 256
= 5 + 1 * 743 / 256
= 6 + 1 * 487 / 256
= 7 + 1 * 231 / 256
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 2310 / 256
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 2054 / 256
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 1798 / 256
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 1542 / 256
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 1286 / 256
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 1030 / 256
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 774 / 256
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 518 / 256
= 7.8 + 0.1 * 262 / 256
= 7.9 + 0.1 * 6 / 256
= 7.90 + 0.01 * 60 / 256
= 7.900 + 0.001 * 600 / 256
= 7.901 + 0.001 * 344 / 256
= 7.902 + 0.001 * 88 / 256
= 7.902

t = 3.99s, d = 125.83m:
t^2 = 3.99 * 3.99:
3.99 * 0.09 = 0.3591
3.99 * 0.90 = 3.5910
3.99 * 3.00 = 11.9700
0.3591 + 3.5910 = 3.9501
3.9501 + 11.9700 = 15.9201
k = 125.83 / 3.99^2 = 125.83 / 15.9201 = 125.830 / 15.920
= 0 + 1 * 125830 / 15920
= 1 + 1 * 109910 / 15920
= 2 + 1 * 93990 / 15920
= 3 + 1 * 78070 / 15920
= 4 + 1 * 62150 / 15920
= 5 + 1 * 46230 / 15920
= 6 + 1 * 30310 / 15920
= 7 + 1 * 14390 / 15920
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 143900 / 15920
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 127980 / 15920
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 112060 / 15920
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 96140 / 15920
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 80220 / 15920
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 64300 / 15920
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 48380 / 15920
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 32460 / 15920
= 7.8 + 0.1 * 16540 / 15920
= 7.9 + 0.1 * 620 / 15920
= 7.90 + 0.01 * 6200 / 15920
= 7.900 + 0.001 * 62000 / 15920
= 7.901 + 0.001 * 46080 / 15920
= 7.902 + 0.001 * 30160 / 15920
= 7.903 + 0.001 * 14240 / 15920
= 7.903

t = 3.72s, d = 109.38m:
t^2 = 3.72 * 3.72:
3.72 * 0.02 = 0.0744
3.72 * 0.70 = 2.6040
3.72 * 3.00 = 11.1600
0.0744 + 2.6040 = 2.6784
2.6784 + 11.1600 = 13.8384
k = 109.38 / 3.72^2 = 109.38 / 13.8384 = 109.380 / 13.838
= 0 + 1 * 109380 / 13838
= 1 + 1 * 95542 / 13838
= 2 + 1 * 81704 / 13838
= 3 + 1 * 67866 / 13838
= 4 + 1 * 54028 / 13838
= 5 + 1 * 40190 / 13838
= 6 + 1 * 26352 / 13838
= 7 + 1 * 12514 / 13838
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 125140 / 13838
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 111302 / 13838
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 97464 / 13838
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 83626 / 13838
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 69788 / 13838
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 55950 / 13838
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 42112 / 13838
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 28274 / 13838
= 7.8 + 0.1 * 14436 / 13838
= 7.9 + 0.1 * 598 / 13838
= 7.90 + 0.01 * 5980 / 13838
= 7.900 + 0.001 * 59800 / 13838
= 7.901 + 0.001 * 45962 / 13838
= 7.902 + 0.001 * 32124 / 13838
= 7.903 + 0.001 * 18286 / 13838
= 7.904 + 0.001 * 4448 / 13838
= 7.904

k values: 7.904, 7.902, 7.903, 7.904
k values (sorted): 7.902, 7.903, 7.904, 7.904
The median k is 7.903.

For t = 3.7:
t^2 = 3.7 * 3.7:
3.7 * 0.7 = 2.59
3.7 * 3.0 = 11.10
2.59 + 11.10 = 13.69
= 13.69

d = 7.903 * 13.69:
7.903 * 0.09 = 0.71127
7.903 * 0.60 = 4.74180
7.903 * 3.00 = 23.70900
7.903 * 10.00 = 79.03000
0.71127 + 4.74180 = 5.45307
5.45307 + 23.70900 = 29.16207
29.16207 + 79.03000 = 108.19207
= 108.192

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{108.192}
